title: ADVOCACY AND SUPPORT FOR VETERANS - 211info
text: VETERAN ADVOCATES OF ORE-IDA ADVOCACY AND SUPPORT FOR VETERANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers advocacy, support, and connection by providing space for camaraderie and conversation, a thrift store, military merchandise sales, treat boxes, quilts, cookies for troops, disposal and retirement of old flags, visitation to veterans who are housebound or in nursing homes, and opportunities to amplify veteran voices and stories. 180 W Idaho Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Veterans, service members, and their families. Volunteering and support is unrestricted. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 889-1978 33. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-1978 Bob Metzger [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of military service AREA SERVED: Malheur County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on W Idaho Avenue, two blocks west of Oregon Street between the Elks and Looks Nu Car Wash. Services: Friendly Outreach Programs * Veterans Military Donations/Relief Programs Military Family Support Groups Veteran Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - VETERAN ADVOCATES OF ORE-IDA FOOD PANTRY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNSELING SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VETERAN ADVOCATES OF ORE-IDA
